title: Chief Scientist's Annual Review 2024
body: "This is the Environment Agency’s Chief Scientist’s annual review for 2024.  The annual review showcases the diverse work of scientists across the Environment Agency in 2024. Case studies demonstrate how science supports our work, how we use data analysis and evaluation to improve decision making, and where we are looking to the future.  Working in partnership, we will continue to produce excellent, trusted, applied science for people and the environment.  "
